extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon won from a breakaway positioned over 2 minutes down on GC, while HENAO Sergio attacked the steep finish gaining time bonuses on ALAPHILIPPE Julian
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE ignored YATES Simon's break due to 2+ minute GC deficit, prioritizing closer threats like GALLOPIN and HENAO Sergio
HENAO Sergio attacked specifically on steepest climb gradient, gaining both time gap and 6-second bonus over ALAPHILIPPE
MARTIN Dan rode domestique sacrificing top-10 GC position for ALAPHILIPPE, revealing QuickStep team hierarchy under pressure

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: capitalized on GC deficit positioning to earn freedom for stage win without triggering team control
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: defended yellow but GALLOPIN dropped in final hundred meters, HENAO Sergio gained through steep gradient attack
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: positive: timed attack precisely to steepest gradient section, maximizing time gain plus bonus seconds against race leader
rider_signals.GALLOPIN Tony: negative: lost ALAPHILIPPE's wheel in final hundred meters of steep finish, conceded 3 seconds without gaining time
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: sacrificed personal top-10 GC to work for ALAPHILIPPE, signaling limited personal ambitions this race
